request: Show me sales trends for 2013 only

sql_queries.title: Monthly Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID WHERE strftime('%Y', OrderDate) = '2013' GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Top Customers by Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CompanyName, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID JOIN Customers c ON o.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE strftime('%Y', OrderDate) = '2013' GROUP BY c.CompanyName ORDER BY Revenue DESC

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue for 2013
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID WHERE strftime('%Y', OrderDate) = '2013'
